stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Using the Regulated Take-Off Weight (RTOW) table for runway 08 of Paris-Orly airport, determine the performance limited take-off mass (to the nearest 100 kg) for a CONF 1+F take-off in the following conditions, interpolating as necessary:

QNH: 999 HPA
OAT: -3°C
Wind: 10 kt headwind
Runway condition: DRY
Air conditioning: ON
